description: Deals/promotions management - create, edit, delete promotional deals. All operations are localStorage-based.
authentication: No real backend - admin auth is localStorage-based
dataStorage: Pure localStorage - key: 'deals', seed: dealsData import

endpoints.name: Get All Deals

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Displays deals list with title, discount percentage, valid dates, associated products, and status

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Deals table with title, description, discount badge, date range, active status, product count, and action buttons (edit, delete, toggle)

endpoints.name: Create Deal

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin submits Add Deal form. Auto-generates id from Date.now().

body.description: New deal object with generated id

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Shows success toast, deal appears in list

endpoints.name: Update Deal

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin saves edited deal. Returns merged object {id, ...data}.

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Shows success toast, deal updates in list

endpoints.name: Delete Deal

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin confirms deal deletion

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Confirmation dialog, success toast, deal removed from list
